rawContent: Fix the typo in the navbar login link.
The reset password email points to a broken URL.
Add a pricing FAQ accordion.
Can you clarify what the analytics opt-in does?
The CTA text on the landing page should say Start free trial.
The sidebar overlaps content on mobile Safari.
Support exporting reports as CSV and PDF.
The avatar upload silently fails on large files.
Update the docs to mention API pagination.
Why does the app ask for notifications immediately?
The homepage hero has too much spacing above the title.
Add SSO support for Azure AD.
The footer year is still 2024.
Please make the dashboard cards easier to scan.
The signup form crashes when the company field is empty.
Could you add keyboard shortcuts to the editor?
The Discord invite link is expired.
What plan includes audit logs?
Make the primary button blue instead of green.
Replace all mentions of workspace with project in onboarding.
